title: Cannot infer dual port read only BRAM on ECP5

features.name: dual_port_read_only_ram_inference
features.description: Code should include a memory array with two separate always blocks both reading from the same memory in a read-only pattern with no write ports

features.name: distributed_memory_multi_read_ports
features.description: Code should include a distributed memory with more than one read port accessed via separate always blocks with different address inputs
